creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 205477
Trivial update of version and distinfo

(In reply to Ronald Klop from comment #3)

Hi Ronald,

indeed, you're right and thanks for pointing that out. I somehow missed it because I had the impression, it was the "classical" convertion from "maintainer-feedback +" into "maintainer-approval +" for the attachment.

When I saw the full Makefile of databases/mongodb36, I was a bit surprised, because "dev@dudu.ro" is the maintainer of that port.

So I switched back from "maintainer-approval +" to "maintainer-approval ?" on that attachment that had already been approved by the maintainer but I wasn't aware of it to that time.

Sorry for any inconvenience! 

Now as everything should be clear, it will speed up the process to get the update of databases/mongodb36 into the ports.
